'''tarudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabillion|zabillion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabillion|zabillion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tarudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæridhith|tæridhith]] || [[word:tæridhij|tæridhij]] || [[word:tæridhish|tæridhish]] || [[word:tæridhi|tæridhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tarurudhuth|tarurudhuth]] || [[word:tarurudhuj|tarurudhuj]] || [[word:tarurudhush|tarurudhush]] || [[word:tarurudhu|tarurudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tarudhuth|tarudhuth]] || [[word:tarudhuj|tarudhuj]] || [[word:tarudhush|tarudhush]] || [[word:tarudhu|tarudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tarufdhuth|tarufdhuth]] || [[word:tarufdhuj|tarufdhuj]] || [[word:tarufdhush|tarufdhush]] || [[word:tarufdhuf|tarufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tarudhuthu|tarudhuthu]] || [[word:tarudhuju|tarudhuju]] || [[word:tarudhushu|tarudhushu]] || [[word:tarudhuku|tarudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tarudhuth|tarudhuth]] || [[word:tarudhuj|tarudhuj]] || [[word:tarudhush|tarudhush]] || [[word:tarudhu|tarudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tarudhuthul|tarudhuthul]] || [[word:tarudhujul|tarudhujul]] || [[word:tarudhushul|tarudhushul]] || [[word:tarudhukul|tarudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tarudhuthuthu|tarudhuthuthu]] || [[word:tarudhujuju|tarudhujuju]] || [[word:tarudhushushu|tarudhushushu]] || [[word:tarudhuku|tarudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tarudhuthun|tarudhuthun]] || [[word:tarudhujun|tarudhujun]] || [[word:tarudhushun|tarudhushun]] || [[word:tarudhukun|tarudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tarudhuthuoro|tarudhuthuoro]] || [[word:tarudhujuoro|tarudhujuoro]] || [[word:tarudhushuoro|tarudhushuoro]] || [[word:tarudhukuoro|tarudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
